Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Cassias Arelius]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Cassias Arelius is an Arelius and walked away from the control board of Sky's Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Cassias Arelius is a member of the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Cassias Arelius uses madra to power scripts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Cassias Arelius has a core that usually shines silver with the light of sword madra.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Cassias Arelius was waiting for Lindon's team at Starsweep Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Cassias Arelius has blond hair similar to Eithan's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Cassias Arelius carries a thin, silver sword at his hip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Cassias Arelius is a Truegold.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Cassias Arelius is the son of Gaien Arelius.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Cassias Arelius appeared next to Lindon.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
